'''鈭歯-z-h''' ('''kanazah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:image|image]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-z-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:image|image]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-z-h
|-
! Lemma
| kanazah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinazah|thinazah]] || [[word:jinazah|jinazah]] || [[word:shinazah|shinazah]] || [[word:kinazah|kinazah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunazah|thuthunazah]] || [[word:jujunazah|jujunazah]] || [[word:shushunazah|shushunazah]] || [[word:kukunazah|kukunazah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunazah|thunazah]] || [[word:junazah|junazah]] || [[word:shunazah|shunazah]] || [[word:kunazah|kunazah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunazah|thunazah]] || [[word:junazah|junazah]] || [[word:shunazah|shunazah]] || [[word:kunazah|kunazah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenazah|thenazah]] || [[word:jenazah|jenazah]] || [[word:shenazah|shenazah]] || [[word:kenazah|kenazah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonazah|thothonazah]] || [[word:jojonazah|jojonazah]] || [[word:shoshonazah|shoshonazah]] || [[word:kokonazah|kokonazah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonazah|thonazah]] || [[word:jonazah|jonazah]] || [[word:shonazah|shonazah]] || [[word:konazah|konazah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonazah|thonazah]] || [[word:jonazah|jonazah]] || [[word:shonazah|shonazah]] || [[word:konazah|konazah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nazah|th忙nazah]] || [[word:j忙nazah|j忙nazah]] || [[word:sh忙nazah|sh忙nazah]] || [[word:k忙nazah|k忙nazah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanazah|thathanazah]] || [[word:jajanazah|jajanazah]] || [[word:shashanazah|shashanazah]] || [[word:kakanazah|kakanazah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanazah|thanazah]] || [[word:janazah|janazah]] || [[word:shanazah|shanazah]] || [[word:kanazah|kanazah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanazah|thanazah]] || [[word:janazah|janazah]] || [[word:shanazah|shanazah]] || [[word:kanazah|kanazah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanazah|shanazah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanazah|goshanazah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanazah|gokishanazah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanazahn眉|shanazahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanazahnkn眉|goshanazahnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazahn眉|gokishanazahn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanazahsh毛|shanazahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanazahnksh毛|goshanazahnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanazahsh毛|gokishanazahsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazahro|shanazahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazahnkro|goshanazahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazahro|gokishanazahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazahmu|shanazahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazahnkmu|goshanazahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazahmu|gokishanazahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanazahsher|shanazahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanazahnksher|goshanazahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanazahsher|gokishanazahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanazahng|shanazahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanazahnkng|goshanazahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanazahng|gokishanazahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanazahya|shanazahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanazahnkya|goshanazahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanazahya|gokishanazahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanazahyam|shanazahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanazahnkyam|goshanazahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanazahyam|gokishanazahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazahn眉sh毛|shanazahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazahnkn眉sh毛|goshanazahnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazahn眉sh毛|gokishanazahn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazahn眉ro|shanazahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazahnkn眉ro|goshanazahnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazahn眉ro|gokishanazahn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazahn眉mu|shanazahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazahnkn眉mu|goshanazahnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazahn眉mu|gokishanazahn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazahsh毛n眉|shanazahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazahnksh毛n眉|goshanazahnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazahsh毛n眉|gokishanazahsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazahsh毛ro|shanazahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazahnksh毛ro|goshanazahnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazahsh毛ro|gokishanazahsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazahsh毛mu|shanazahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazahnksh毛mu|goshanazahnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazahsh毛mu|gokishanazahsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazahron眉|shanazahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazahnkron眉|goshanazahnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazahron眉|gokishanazahron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazahrosh毛|shanazahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazahnkrosh毛|goshanazahnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazahrosh毛|gokishanazahrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazahromu|shanazahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazahnkromu|goshanazahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazahromu|gokishanazahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazahmun眉|shanazahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazahnkmun眉|goshanazahnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazahmun眉|gokishanazahmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazahmush毛|shanazahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazahnkmush毛|goshanazahnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazahmush毛|gokishanazahmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazahmuro|shanazahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazahnkmuro|goshanazahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazahmuro|gokishanazahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a6f1c69}}
